title: Thawing After Aokiji
description: After the encounter with Aokiji, the Straw Hats recover from ice and the crew understands how dangerous the Grand Line has become for Robin.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part follows Chopper, Nami, Zoro, Usopp, Nico Robin. After the encounter with Aokiji, the Straw Hats recover from ice and the crew understands how dangerous the Grand Line has become for Robin.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I think she is in stasis.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'll tell you later! We're going back,

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: So hurry up and thaw us!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: But Nico Robin is in the bathroom already...

summary: After the encounter with Aokiji, the Straw Hats recover from ice and the crew understands how dangerous the Grand Line has become for Robin.
